section.heading: Waiver
section.chapeau: The President may waive the requirement to include a person on a list required by section 8791, 8792, or 8793 of this title or to impose sanctions pursuant to any such section if the President—

paragraph.content: determines that such a waiver is in the national security interests of the United States; and
submits to the appropriate congressional committees a report on the reasons for that determination.

note.heading: Termination of Section
note.p: For termination of section, see section 8795 of this title.
